title: Contract Snapshot
description: What we last verified the provider returns (ADD-18 / RFC-0006 Phase 2). source:recorded only — the golden fixture IS the contract, no upstream spec required. Drives `archstone verify`.

source.description: Only 'recorded' is supported today; 'openapi' spec-diff is deferred (ADD-18 §Deferred).

fingerprint.description: Hash of the recorded response SHAPE (sorted key paths + value type), not its values.

fixture.description: Path to the golden fixture JSON, relative to the manifest directory.
